notes: v1.3.62 ships three critical fixes. (1) MLLM prefix cache was silently disabled: MLLMPrefixCacheManager.__len__ existed but __bool__ did not, so `if self._cache_manager` fell through to len-based bool. Empty cache evaluated False → first store skipped → cache never populated → no request ever hit. Fix uses is-not-None. Verified on Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-JANGTQ2. (2) Non-stream reasoning leaked into content: OpenAI chat + Responses API non-stream paths called reset_state without think_in_prompt, making the parser miss reasoning for always-thinking templates (MiniMax M2.x, Qwen3, DeepSeek R1). Fix at both non-stream sites. Verified on MiniMax-M2.7-JANGTQ-CRACK 4-cell matrix. (3) Token IDs stored as [0]*N dummy: generate() now routes through store() with real token_ids so prefix matching works on exact repeats. Plus VMLX_ALLOW_HYBRID_CHUNKED_PREFILL=1 opt-in for vmlx#89 Metal OOM on >34K hybrid SSM text prompts (default OFF = zero behavior change), torchvision-free video processor fallback, and 65 new regression guards pinning every reasoning-on/off invariant across OpenAI/Responses/Anthropic/Ollama. Full suite: Python 2163 pass, Panel TS 1545 pass.
